tasks.label: Shopify: Theme Push Unpublished
tasks.command: node scripts/fix-settings-json.mjs ; shopify theme push --nodelete --unpublished --store totvsrj-maxxxmoveis-dc.myshopify.com

tasks.label: Shopify: Theme Push Live
tasks.command: shopify theme pull --theme 143413805174 --only 'config/settings_data.json' --only 'templates/*.json' --store totvsrj-maxxxmoveis-dc.myshopify.com ; node scripts/fix-settings-json.mjs ; shopify theme push --theme 143413805174 --nodelete --allow-live --store totvsrj-maxxxmoveis-dc.myshopify.com

tasks.label: Shopify: Theme Push
